title: Moonfin Settings
description: Navigation, home screen, media bar, and visual customization.

children.title: Navigation Bar
children.description: Navbar position and toolbar buttons.

children.title: Position
children.description: Choose where to display the navigation bar. 'Top' shows a horizontal bar at the top of the screen. 'Left' shows a vertical sidebar on the left.

children.title: Navbar Color
children.description: Set the navigation bar color independently from Media Bar overlay settings.

children.title: Navbar Opacity
children.description: Set navigation bar opacity independently from Media Bar overlay settings.

children.title: Show Favorites Button
children.description: Show the favorites button in the navigation bar

children.title: Show Genres Button
children.description: Show the genres button in the navigation bar

children.title: Show Libraries
children.description: Show the libraries button in the navigation bar

children.title: Show Shuffle Button
children.description: Show the shuffle button in the navigation bar

children.title: Home Screen
children.description: Continue Watching behavior, multi-server rows, and thumbnail preference.

children.title: Merge Continue Watching and Next Up
children.description: Combine Continue Watching and Next Up into one row

children.title: Multi-Server Libraries
children.description: Combine items from multiple servers in a single view

children.title: Prefer Thumbnails
children.description: If thumbnails are selected in Home Row Image, show series instead of episode thumbnails.

children.title: Featured Media Bar
children.description: Featured carousel content and overlay appearance.

children.title: Enable Media Bar
children.description: Display a featured content slideshow at the top of the home screen.

children.title: Content Type
children.description: Choose which types of content appear in the Featured Media carousel.

children.title: Media Bar Source
children.description: Choose whether Media Bar items come from libraries or collections/playlists.

children.title: Library Selection
children.description: Choose which libraries are used when source is Libraries. Empty selection uses all libraries.

children.title: Collection / Playlist Selection
children.description: Choose which collections/playlists are used when source is Collections & Playlists. Empty selection uses all collections/playlists.

children.title: Excluded Genres
children.description: Exclude selected genres from Media Bar results.

children.title: Auto-Advance Interval
children.description: Time between automatic Media Bar slide changes.

children.title: Items Count
children.description: Number of items to display in the Featured Media carousel.

children.title: Overlay Color
children.description: Set the color for all UI overlays (media bar, navigation bar, sidebar).

children.title: Overlay Opacity
children.description: Set the opacity for all UI overlays (media bar, navigation bar, sidebar).

children.title: Theme Music
children.description: Play theme songs while browsing media detail pages

children.title: Auto-Play
children.description: Play theme songs while browsing media detail pages

children.title: Shuffle
children.description: Random content playback settings.

children.title: Content Type
children.description: Select what type of content to shuffle.

children.title: Visual Effects
children.description: Backdrop and visual customization.

children.title: Detail Screen Backdrop Blur
children.description: Control the blur effect for movie, TV show, and episode detail screens. Higher values create a more frosted glass effect.

children.title: Home & Seerr Backdrop Blur
children.description: Control the blur effect for home screen and discovery (genres/favorites) screens. Lower values improve visibility and performance.

children.title: Support Moonfin
children.description: Help support continued development of Moonfin. Press OK to learn more or visit https://buymeacoffee.com/moonfin.

title: Moonfin Plugin
description: Plugin connectivity, settings sync, ratings, and Seerr integration.

children.title: Enable Plugin
children.description: Connect to the Moonfin server plugin. Requires the Moonfin plugin to be installed on your Jellyfin server.

children.title: Settings Sync
children.description: Sync settings with plugin

children.title: Home Screen Sections
children.description: Show rows from the Home Screen Sections Jellyfin plugin.

children.title: KefinTweaks
children.description: Show rows from the KefinTweaks Jellyfin plugin.

children.title: MDBList Ratings
children.description: Enable additional ratings from configured sources.

children.title: Enable Ratings
children.description: Pull scores from IMDb, Rotten Tomatoes, and more

children.title: TMDB
children.description: TMDB episode rating integration via the Moonfin server plugin.

children.title: Episode Ratings
children.description: Show ratings for individual episodes

children.title: Seerr
children.description: Enable Seerr integration in navigation.

children.title: Enable Seerr
children.description: Show Seerr in navigation

children.title: Block NSFW Content
children.description: Hide adult content from Seerr search results and requests.

children.title: Account & Sign In
children.description: Sign in to Seerr or manage your logged-in account.

title: Playback
description: Audio/video playback, subtitles, bitrate, and compatibility controls.

children.title: Are You Still Watching Popup
children.description: How many minutes of inactivity before playback is stopped between items and a popup is shown to continue? Set to 0 to disable.

children.title: Autoplay Episode Limit
children.description: The number of episodes that will play automatically after the selected episode. Requires 'Play next episode automatically' server setting to be enabled.

children.title: Bitrate Limit
children.description: Configure the maximum playback bitrate.

children.title: Enable Limit
children.description: Enable or disable the 'Maximum Bitrate' setting.

children.title: Maximum Bitrate
children.description: Set the maximum bitrate in Mbps. Set to 0 to use Roku's specifications. This setting must be enabled to take effect.

children.title: Burn in subtitle when transcoding
children.description: Burn in all subtitles when transcoding is triggered. This ensures subtitle synchronization after transcoding at the cost of reduced transcoding speed.

children.title: Cinema Mode
children.description: Bring the theater experience straight to your living room with the ability to play custom intros before the main feature.

children.title: Compatibility
children.description: Attempt to prevent playback failures.

children.title: Disable HEVC
children.description: Disable the HEVC codec on this device. This may improve playback for some devices (ultra).

children.title: Custom Subtitles
children.description: Replace Roku's default subtitle functions with custom functions that support CJK fonts. Fallback fonts must be configured and enabled on the server for CJK rendering to work.

children.title: Custom Trickplay
children.description: Display custom trickplay images even if this Roku says it's displaying its own. This may cause the two images to overlay on top of each other.

children.title: Force Transcoding
children.description: Force all playable media to be transcoded.

children.title: Maximum Audio Channels
children.description: Configure the maximum audio channels when playing video files on this device.

options.title: Off - Attempt to play all channels

children.title: Maximum Resolution
children.description: Configure the maximum resolution when playing video files on this device.

children.title: Mode
children.description: Apply max resolution to all files or only transcoded files.

children.title: Value
children.description: Set the maximum resolution when playing video files on this device.

options.title: Off - Attempt to play all resolutions

children.title: Media Segment Actions
children.description: Settings relating to how Jellyfin should handle media segments.

children.title: Commercial Segments
children.description: What action should Jellyfin take for commercial segments?

children.title: Intro Segments
children.description: What action should Jellyfin take for intro segments?

children.title: Outro Segments
children.description: What action should Jellyfin take for outro segments?

children.title: Preview Segments
children.description: What action should Jellyfin take for preview segments?

children.title: Recap Segments
children.description: What action should Jellyfin take for recap segments?

children.title: Next Episode Button Time
children.description: If no Outro media segment exists, set how many seconds before the end of an episode the Skip Outro button should appear. Set to 0 to disable.

children.title: Preferred Audio Codec
children.description: Use the selected audio codec for transcodes. If the device or stream does not support it, a fallback codec will be used.

children.title: Show Next Episode Details After Finish
children.description: If auto play next episode is disabled, display the next episode's detail screen after an episode finishes playing. If no next up episode is found, return to the just-played episode's page.

children.title: Text Subtitles Only
children.description: Only display text subtitles to minimize transcoding.

children.title: Video Codec Support
children.description: Enable or disable Direct Play support for certain codecs.

children.title: MPEG-2
children.description: Support Direct Play of MPEG-2 content (e.g., Live TV). This will prevent transcoding of MPEG-2 content, but uses significantly more bandwidth.

children.title: MPEG-4
children.description: Support Direct Play of MPEG-4 content. This may need to be disabled for playback of DIVX encoded video files.

children.title: Video Profile Level Support
children.description: Attempt Direct Play of potentially unsupported profile levels

children.title: H.264
children.description: Attempt Direct Play for H.264 media with unsupported profile levels before falling back to transcoding if it fails.

children.title: HEVC
children.description: Attempt Direct Play for HEVC media with unsupported profile levels before falling back to transcoding if it fails.

title: Remember Me?
description: Remember the currently logged in user and try to log them in again next time you start Jellyfin.

title: Secret
description: Nothing here. The settings are in another castle.

title: User Interface
description: Settings relating to how the application looks.

children.title: Colors
children.description: Change the colors of elements in the app.

children.title: All Screens
children.description: Colors used across multiple screens.

children.title: Background
children.description: The base background color. Background images are layered on top of this color.

children.title: Cursor
children.description: The color of the remote control's cursor.

children.title: Primary Text
children.description: The primary text color.

children.title: Watched Check Mark & Unplayed Count
children.description: Colors specific to the watched check mark & unplayed count box.

children.title: Background
children.description: The background color of the check mark & unplayed count shown in the top right corner of items.

children.title: Unplayed Count
children.description: The color of the unplayed count number.

children.title: Watched Check Mark
children.description: The color of the watched check mark.

children.title: Dialog Popups
children.description: Colors specific to dialog popups

children.title: Background
children.description: The background color for all dialog popups.

children.title: Bold Text
children.description: The text color for bold text.

children.title: Horizontal Border line
children.description: The color of the thin border line under the header text.

children.title: Selected Text
children.description: The text color for the item the cursor is over.

children.title: Text Color
children.description: The text color for title and items the cursor is not over.

children.title: What's New Author
children.description: The text color for the author in the What's New popup.

children.title: Home Screen
children.description: Colors specific to the home screen

children.title: My List Icon
children.description: The color of the star icon in the My List library item.

children.title: Row Headers
children.description: The text color of the headers of each row.

children.title: Row Item Background
children.description: The background color of items. Only seen if no image loads on top of it.

children.title: Row Item Progress
children.description: The color of the watched portion of the progress bar.

children.title: Row Item Progress Background
children.description: The background color of the progress bar.

children.title: Row Item Title
children.description: The text color of the first line displayed under items.

children.title: Username In Header
children.description: The text color of the user's name in the header.

children.title: General
children.description: Settings relating to the appearance of the Home screen and the program in general.

children.title: Show What's New Popup
children.description: Show What's New popup when Jellyfin is updated to a new version.

children.title: Use Fallback Font Across App
children.description: Changes the font used in the app to the server's configured fallback font.

children.title: Home Rows
children.description: Customize the home screen sections

children.title: Section 1
children.description: Select what to show in section 1. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Section 2
children.description: Select what to show in section 2. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Section 3
children.description: Select what to show in section 3. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Section 4
children.description: Select what to show in section 4. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Section 5
children.description: Select what to show in section 5. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Section 6
children.description: Select what to show in section 6. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Section 7
children.description: Select what to show in section 7. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Section 8
children.description: Select what to show in section 8. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Use Server Home Row Settings
children.description: When enabled, Moonfin will use the home row configuration from your Jellyfin server instead of the settings below. Moonfin will need to be closed and reopened for change to take effect.

children.title: Item Detail Screen
children.description: Settings relating to the appearance of the item detail screen.

children.title: Community and Critical Ratings
children.description: Community and critic review ratings from Rotten Tomatoes.

children.title: Libraries
children.description: Settings relating to the appearance of Library pages.

children.title: Forget Filters
children.description: Forget applied library filters when Jellyfin is closed.

children.title: Grid View Item Titles
children.description: Select when to show titles in grid view.

children.title: Library Image Orientation
children.description: Select the poster image orientation for the library views.

children.title: Library Landscape Column Count
children.description: Number of columns in library view when showing landscape (wide) images

children.title: Library Portrait Column Count
children.description: Number of columns in library view when showing portrait (tall) images

children.title: Library Square Column Count
children.description: Number of columns in library view when showing square images

children.title: TV Shows
children.description: Settings relating to the appearance of pages in TV Libraries.

children.title: Blur Unwatched Episode Thumbnails
children.description: Apply a blur effect to thumbnails of unwatched episodes to avoid spoilers.

children.title: Disable Unwatched Episode Count
children.description: If enabled, the number of unwatched episodes in a series/season will be removed.

children.title: Max Days Next Up
children.description: Set the maximum amount of days a show should stay in the 'Next Up' list without watching it. Maximum value is 1000 days.

children.title: Rewatching Next Up
children.description: Show already watched episodes in 'Next Up' sections.

children.title: Skip Details for Single Seasons
children.description: If enabled, selecting a TV series with only one season will go straight to the episode list rather than the show details and season list.

children.title: Start Episode List From First Unwatched Episode
children.description: When opening a season's list of episodes, automatically scroll down and start the cursor on the first unwatched episode.

children.title: Two Column Episode List
children.description: Display the episode list in two columns instead of one.
